security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Quản lý color palette + design token, AI gợi ý palette WCAG-compliant
bundle.longDescription: TrishDesign — xây scale màu 50..950 theo chuẩn Tailwind, check contrast WCAG 2.1 (AA/AAA), build harmony complementary/triadic/analogous/tetradic, gợi ý palette hoàn chỉnh từ 1 hex base với target mode (light/dark/brand), export ra CSS custom properties, Tailwind config, Figma Tokens JSON, SCSS map. Alpha local; cross-device sync dời 14.4.4.b.
